{{Relic Infobox|Blood Vial???|2}}{{R|Blood Vial???||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]]. It is a weaker version of {{R|Blood Vial||2}}. It restores 1 HP at the start of each combat.

== Sources ==
Can be bought from the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]]. Also can be obtained upon defeating the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]] in combat.
